mapper.sql: p.post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.view_count, p.status, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_deleted, p.deleted_at, p.is_blinded, p.playlist_id, p.image_urls, p.admin_edit_reason, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.created_by, p.updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image AS author_profile_image FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}

SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image AS author_profile_image FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.status = #{status} AND p.is_deleted = false AND p.category != 'PLAYLIST_SHARE'
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.created_at DESC ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image AS author_profile_image FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.category = #{category} AND p.status = #{status} AND p.is_deleted = false
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC ORDER BY p.view_count DESC, p.created_at DESC ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = false AND category != 'PLAYLIST_SHARE'
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE category = #{category} AND status = #{status} AND is_deleted = false
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( user_id, title, content, category, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, is_deleted, is_blinded, playlist_id, image_urls, pl_snapshot_name, pl_snapshot_desc, pl_snapshot_cover_url, pl_snapshot_movie_count, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{status}, 0, 0, 0, false, false, #{playlistId}, #{imageUrls}, #{playlistSnapshotName}, #{playlistSnapshotDesc}, #{playlistSnapshotCoverUrl}, #{playlistSnapshotMovieCount}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, playlist_id = #{playlistId}, admin_edit_reason = #{adminEditReason}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, is_blinded = #{isBlinded}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.view_count, p.status, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_deleted, p.deleted_at, p.is_blinded, p.playlist_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.created_by, p.updated_by FROM posts p WHERE p.playlist_id = #{playlistId} AND p.category = 'PLAYLIST_SHARE' AND p.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count + #{delta}, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count + #{delta}, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select:
SELECT , u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image AS author_profile_image FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p

SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.category, p.view_count, p.status, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.is_deleted, p.deleted_at, p.is_blinded, p.playlist_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.created_by, p.updated_by, u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image AS author_profile_image, COALESCE(p.pl_snapshot_name, pl.playlist_name) AS pl_playlist_name, COALESCE(p.pl_snapshot_desc, pl.description) AS pl_description, COALESCE(p.pl_snapshot_cover_url, pl.cover_image_url) AS pl_cover_image_url, pl.like_count AS pl_like_count, COALESCE(p.pl_snapshot_movie_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_item pi2 WHERE pi2.playlist_id = p.playlist_id)) AS pl_movie_count, CASE WHEN pl_like.playlist_like_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS pl_liked_by_me FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN playlist pl ON p.playlist_id = pl.playlist_id LEFT JOIN playlist_likes pl_like ON pl_like.playlist_id = p.playlist_id AND pl_like.user_id = #{userId} WHERE p.category = 'PLAYLIST_SHARE' AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.is_deleted = false AND (pl.playlist_id IS NULL OR pl.is_deleted = false) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p LEFT JOIN playlist pl ON p.playlist_id = pl.playlist_id WHERE p.category = 'PLAYLIST_SHARE' AND p.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND p.is_deleted = false AND (pl.playlist_id IS NULL OR pl.is_deleted = false)
mapper.sql: post_comment_id, post_id, category_id, user_id, parent_comment_id, content, is_deleted, like_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT pc.post_comment_id, pc.post_id, pc.category_id, pc.user_id, pc.parent_comment_id, pc.content, pc.is_deleted, pc.like_count, pc.created_at, pc.updated_at, u.nickname AS nickname FROM post_comment pc LEFT JOIN users u ON pc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE pc.post_comment_id = #{postCommentId}

SELECT pc.post_comment_id, pc.post_id, pc.category_id, pc.user_id, pc.parent_comment_id, pc.content, pc.is_deleted, pc.like_count, pc.created_at, pc.updated_at, u.nickname AS nickname FROM post_comment pc LEFT JOIN users u ON pc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE pc.post_id = #{postId} AND pc.is_deleted = false ORDER BY pc.created_at ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.update: UPDATE post_comment SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_comment_id = #{postCommentId}
UPDATE post_comment SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count + #{delta}, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_comment_id = #{postCommentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_likes (post_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO comment_likes (comment_id, user_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{userId}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO post_declaration ( post_id, category_id, user_id, reported_user_id, target_type, declaration_content, toxicity_score, status, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{reportedUserId}, #{targetType}, #{declarationContent}, #{toxicityScore}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{userId}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE is_deleted = false
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM posts WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND is_deleted = false GROUP BY category ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_declaration
SELECT AVG(toxicity_score) FROM post_declaration WHERE toxicity_score IS NOT NULL

SELECT CASE WHEN toxicity_score < 0.2 THEN '0.0~0.2' WHEN toxicity_score < 0.4 THEN '0.2~0.4' WHEN toxicity_score < 0.6 THEN '0.4~0.6' WHEN toxicity_score < 0.8 THEN '0.6~0.8' ELSE '0.8~1.0' END AS range_label, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM post_declaration WHERE toxicity_score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY range_label ORDER BY range_label ASC
